added.description: Added `web_test` CI feature with standalone ubuntu job, configurable concurrency, and test path filtering
Enabled `build_runner` feature to run build_runner before analyze/test steps
Enhanced managed test with full output capture and rich job summaries
Added Utf8BoundedBuffer utility for testable byte-bounded stream capture
Expanded workflow generator validation assertions and edge case tests

changed.description: Made artifact retention days configurable via ci config
Standardized Windows pub-cache paths to match release/triage templates
Consolidated test utils into StepSummary and deleted standalone test_results_util
Broadened CI dart formatting and safe staging to capture non-lib Dart edits

fixed.description: Stabilized managed test verification across environments
Prevented release race and extended long-running release stages timeouts
Hardened web_test for Ubuntu AppArmor userns restrictions
Streamed test result parsing to avoid loading large NDJSON files into memory
Tightened ci config validation rules for secrets and line lengths
Hardened process execution and runtime config boundaries

security.description: Hardened input validation, shell escaping, and symlink protection for all Mustache-interpolated values
Added cumulative size guard to prevent exceeding GitHub step summary limit
Guarded logDir creation and log file writes with FileSystemException catch blocks
